name: canonify-esign-sender
description: A reference ViewSpec catalog for the Canon-customer e-signature SENDER surface: a creator-scoped sent-agreements table (title + status + decline_reason, with a per-row void), plus a create form for new signing envelopes. Distributed as an on-disk catalog.apply bundle (views + policies only) that composes the PLATFORM signature_envelope object-type and the signature_envelope.create/.void actions already present in every canon — nothing is baked into the empty canon. Apply it on demand with `canon catalog apply`.

resources.title: Sender catalog — apply guide
resources.description: How to apply the sender-catalog/ bundle with `canon catalog apply`, the creator_account_id prerequisite (the x20 server-side read-fence), the expected-revision optimistic-concurrency note, what the two views + three policies grant, and how re-apply is idempotent + managed-provenance-stamped.
